description_long: This shotgun features a long, cylindrical barrel with a metallic, ribbed fore-end and a robust, industrial design. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark, glossy metal, while the stock and grip are crafted from a wood-textured material with a rich brown hue. The stock is full-sized and ergonomically shaped, providing a solid shoulder rest. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, enclosing a metallic trigger. The shotgun's action mechanism appears to be pump-action, with a visible pump handle beneath the barrel. Overall, the object combines metallic and wooden elements, giving it a classic yet rugged appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A long, pump-action shotgun with a dark metallic barrel and a brown wooden full stock, featuring a ribbed fore-end and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, ribbed fore-end, and symmetrical alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the ribbed pump handle, the wooden stock, and the trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pointed end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the pump handle and stock contours.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with ribbing on the fore-end
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
